_comment: Tracebit canary configuration template. Values are filled by 'tracebit deploy all'.
_note: The CLI auto-manages this config. Edit only if using API-based deployment (see references/api-reference.md).

placement._note: Placement locations are managed by the Tracebit CLI. See CLI documentation for defaults.
placement.aws: standard AWS credentials location (new canary profile)
placement.ssh: standard SSH directory (new canary key file)
